Advent.title: A Day of Expectant Hope
Advent.body: Advent invites a watchful heart. Stay awake to the quiet ways Christ is already coming into the ordinary rhythm of today.
Advent.prayer: Lord Jesus, make my heart ready to receive you with hope, patience, and joy.

heroVerse.text: Prepare the way of the Lord, make straight his paths.

reflections.verse: The people who walked in darkness have seen a great light.
reflections.reflection: Christ comes into places that have felt dim or uncertain. Let his light meet you there today.

reflections.verse: Stay awake, for you do not know on which day your Lord will come.
reflections.reflection: Watchfulness is not anxiety. It is a steady readiness shaped by trust.

saintQuote.quote: Let us prepare our hearts to receive the Lord in humility and love.

Christmas.title: The Word Made Flesh
Christmas.body: The mystery of Christmas is God's nearness. Receive this day as a gift and let gratitude become your praise.
Christmas.prayer: Lord Jesus, born for us, dwell in my heart and make me a bearer of your peace.

heroVerse.text: And the Word was made flesh, and dwelt among us.

reflections.verse: Glory to God in the highest and on earth peace to those on whom his favor rests.
reflections.reflection: Peace begins where Christ is welcomed. Ask for grace to welcome him again today.

reflections.verse: A child is born for us, a son is given us.
reflections.reflection: God's power comes to us clothed in humility. Let that reshape the way you see greatness.

saintQuote.quote: What can I give him, poor as I am? If I were a shepherd I would bring a lamb. Yet what I can I give him: give my heart.

Lent.title: A Day of Conversion
Lent.body: Lent clears space for repentance, prayer, and mercy. Return to the Lord with honesty, and let his compassion renew your strength.
Lent.prayer: Merciful Father, draw me closer to you in prayer, fasting, and works of charity.

heroVerse.text: Create in me a clean heart, O God, and renew a steadfast spirit within me.

reflections.verse: Even now, says the Lord, return to me with your whole heart.
reflections.reflection: God does not wait for a perfect version of you. He asks for your whole heart today.

reflections.verse: If today you hear his voice, harden not your hearts.
reflections.reflection: Conversion grows through small acts of surrender. Notice where the Lord is asking for one more yes.

saintQuote.quote: We always find that those who walked closest to Christ were those who had to bear the greatest trials.

Easter.title: A Day of Resurrection Joy
Easter.body: The risen Lord stands among his people with peace. Let Easter joy move you from fear toward witness and renewed trust.
Easter.prayer: Risen Christ, fill me with your peace and make my life a living witness to your victory.

heroVerse.text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.

reflections.reflection: The resurrection steadies us in uncertainty. Christ has gone before you into this day.
Easter peace is not the absence of struggle but the presence of the risen Lord within it.

saintQuote.quote: The glory of God is man fully alive.

Ordinary Time.title: Grace for the Ordinary Day
Ordinary Time.body: Ordinary Time teaches steady discipleship. God is present in the repeated, the hidden, and the faithful work of today.
Ordinary Time.prayer: Lord, teach me to find you in ordinary duties and to serve you with a generous heart.

heroVerse.text: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.

reflections.verse: Whatever you do, do everything for the glory of God.
reflections.reflection: The holiness of a day is often hidden inside ordinary tasks done with love.

reflections.verse: My grace is sufficient for you.
reflections.reflection: You do not need extraordinary certainty to be faithful. Grace is already meeting you where you are.

saintQuote.quote: Do small things with great love.

HolyWeek_Tuesday.title: Tuesday of Holy Week
HolyWeek_Tuesday.body: Holy Week draws us close to the Lord's final hours. Today the Church contemplates both betrayal and fidelity, inviting us to remain near Christ with humble love.
HolyWeek_Tuesday.prayer: Lord Jesus, keep me faithful when I am tested, and teach me to stay close to you in humility and love.

heroVerse.text: In you, O Lord, I take refuge; let me never be put to shame.

reflections.verse: The Lord called me from birth, from my mother's womb he gave me my name.
reflections.reflection: Even in sorrow and uncertainty, God remains faithful to his call. Let that faithfulness steady your own yes today.

reflections.verse: Now is the Son of Man glorified, and God is glorified in him.
reflections.reflection: Christ reveals glory through surrender. Ask for courage to trust God's work even when the path feels costly.

saintQuote.quote: Fix your eyes on the crucified and nothing else will seem important.
